title: error using exceljs
author: Nana186
body:
Hi,

I'm getting this  error using ExcelJS:
```

63% building 8/8 modules 0 active    
    ERROR in ../../../../node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts:1415:22 - error TS2307: Cannot find module 'stream'.

                                       ~~~~~~~~

    ../../../../node_modules/exceljs/index.d.ts:1936:39 - error TS2307: Cannot find module 'stream'.
```

comments.author: Alanscut
comments.body: @Nana186 See issue #1191, hope it helps you.

comments.author: sebcza
comments.body:
I have the same issue in Angular 8 app. 
I updated nodeJS to newest.
I added "types": [ "node" ] to tsconfig.json
I installed 13.13.12 @types/node

And still Cannot find module 'stream'.

comments.author: Umashankar8895
MohammedBrh
comments.body:
**solution without the change in the tsConfig file**

this method does not support an array of objects or objects, but it does support an array or an array of arrays.

if you have used excelJs methods with objects or an array of objects this problem will occur.
u can use a function to transfer the object to array : 

- Object.values(obj)

**Angular CLI: 12.2.3
Node: 14.17.4
Package Manager: npm 6.14.14**

comments.author: allexandry
comments.body:
> I fixed it by add "types": ["node"] to "tsconfig.app.json" inside "compilerOptions" as- **"compilerOptions": { ......... "types": ["node"] }**

This worked for me using "tsconfig.app.json" not "tsconfig.json"
